title: LG’s 27-inch Tandem OLED gaming monitor is cheaper than ever
summary: LG's 27GX700A-B 1440p OLED gaming monitor has dropped to $484.99-$499.99 from $599.99, featuring a 280Hz refresh rate, 0.03ms response time, and support for FreeSync and G-Sync. This represents a significant price reduction for cutting-edge OLED panel gaming tech offering excellent specs for 1440p PC and console gaming.
content:
The price of LG’s UltraGear 27GX700A-B 1440p gaming monitor that came out last August has dropped to nearly its best price yet. You can grab it at Amazon for $484.99 or at LG for $499.99 (originally $599.99). That’s a great deal considering this is one of LG’s Primary RGB Tandem panels built with fourth-generation WOLED tech that delivers higher brightness and punchier contrast than its predecessors, rivaling QD-OLED.
LG 27-inch UltraGear Tandem OLED gaming monitor

Where to Buy:

 $599.99 $484.99 at Amazon
 $599.99 $499.99 at LG

This model could satisfy gamers with PCs built to deliver smooth 1440p gameplay. It features a 280Hz refresh rate, twin HDMI 2.1 and one DisplayPort 1.4 jack, a near-instant .03-millisecond response time, not to mention a thin design. The monitor also has some USB-A ports for connecting accessories, plus a headphone jack for private listening.
The 27GX700A-B supports AMD FreeSync Premium Pro and is Nvidia G-Sync-compatible, meaning it supports variable refresh rates and can keep the image running smoothly even with variations in frame rate. We haven’t tested this model, but reviews site Rtings does say it has “distracting VRR flicker,” though that likely depends on the game.
While costs have risen in recent months on computer components like RAM and storage, it’s been delightful to watch prices go in the opposite direction for OLED gaming monitors. Some people may prefer to spend less on fast, feature-packed IPS and VA panels, but it’s nice that there are more opportunities to get cutting-edge panel tech for your gaming PC or console.

zh.title: LG 27英寸Tandem OLED游戏显示器降价创新低
zh.summary: LG 27GX700A-B 1440p OLED游戏显示器从599.99美元降价至484.99-499.99美元，具备280Hz刷新率、0.03毫秒响应时间，支持FreeSync和G-Sync。这代表了高端OLED面板游戏显示器的重大降价，为1440p PC和游戏机玩家提供了出色的规格。

title: Clicks shows off its BlackBerry-inspired phone in a new hands-on video
summary: Clicks Communicator is an upcoming BlackBerry-inspired smartphone with a physical keyboard that runs modern apps, shown in a new hands-on video. The device represents a revival of the physical keyboard trend in smartphones.
content: A new video shows the final production version of the upcoming Clicks Communicator, a BlackBerry-like smartphone that runs modern apps.

zh.title: Clicks在新上手视频中展示其黑莓风格手机
zh.summary: Clicks Communicator是一款即将推出的黑莓风格智能手机，配备物理键盘，可运行现代应用，在新的上手视频中展示。该设备代表了物理键盘在智能手机上的复兴。

title: 007 First Light’s developer lays off staff but claims its next franchise will continue
summary: IO Interactive, developer of Hitman and 007 First Light, announced staff layoffs after losing its partnership with an external publisher for Project Fantasy, an online fantasy RPG. Microsoft was reportedly the intended publisher before the partnership ended as part of Xbox's broader cost-cutting initiatives.
content:
IO Interactive, the studio behind the Hitman series and 007 First Light, announced that it is laying off staff after a relationship with an "external partner" on its next big franchise, Project Fantasy, "has come to an end." IO has described Project Fantasy as an "online fantasy RPG", and Kotaku and Bloomberg report that Microsoft, which is planning significant cuts as part of a broader "reset" of the Xbox business, was going to be the game's publisher. 
It's unclear how many people will be affected by IO's "staffing decisions." The company says "we are fully committed to supporting those affected through this challenging transition." IO al …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 《007首光》开发商裁员但声称其下一部特许作品将继续
zh.summary: 《杀手》和《007首光》的开发商IO Interactive在失去Project Fantasy这款在线幻想RPG的外部发行商合作后宣布裁员。据报道微软原本是预期的发行商，但这一合作在Xbox更广泛的成本削减计划中告终。

title: Nvidia competitor Etched hits $5B valuation, $1B in sales for AI chip
summary: Etched, an Nvidia competitor in AI chips, has reached a $5 billion valuation and already booked $1 billion in contracts for its inference systems. The achievement signals growing competition in the high-value AI semiconductor market and diversification beyond Nvidia's dominance.
content: Nvidia AI chip competitor Etched says it has already booked $1 billion under contract for the inference systems powered by its chip.

zh.title: Etched达到50亿美元估值，AI芯片销售合同达10亿美元
zh.summary: Etched是Nvidia的竞争对手，在AI芯片领域已达到50亿美元的估值，并已为其推理系统预订了10亿美元的合同。这一成就表明高价值AI半导体市场竞争加剧，并出现了超越Nvidia主导地位的多元化发展。

title: Anthropic launches Claude Sonnet 5 as a cheaper way to run agents
summary: Anthropic launched Claude Sonnet 5, offering stronger agentic capabilities and lower pricing compared to Opus, GPT-5.5, and Gemini Pro. The model positions Anthropic's offering as a cost-effective alternative for running AI agents with improved safety features.
content: Anthropic’s Claude Sonnet 5 brings stronger agentic capabilities, lower pricing, and improved safety, positioning the model as a cheaper alternative to Opus, GPT-5.5, and Gemini Pro.

zh.title: Anthropic推出Claude Sonnet 5作为更便宜的AI Agent运行方案
zh.summary: Anthropic推出了Claude Sonnet 5，相比Opus、GPT-5.5和Gemini Pro提供更强大的代理功能和更低的价格。该模型将Anthropic的产品定位为运行AI代理的具有改进安全功能的经济高效替代方案。

title: Acti puts AI agents directly into your smartphone keyboard
summary: Acti has launched a keyboard for iOS and Android that integrates AI assistants directly into the smartphone keyboard interface, allowing users to create custom AI-powered shortcuts using natural language. The product positions the smartphone keyboard as the next frontier for AI assistant integration.
content: Acti is betting the smartphone keyboard is the next home for AI assistants. The startup's new keyboard for iOS and Android works across apps and lets users create custom AI-powered shortcuts using natural language.

zh.title: Acti将AI助手直接集成到智能手机键盘中
zh.summary: Acti为iOS和Android推出了一款键盘，将AI助手直接集成到智能手机键盘界面中，允许用户使用自然语言创建自定义的AI驱动快捷方式。该产品将智能手机键盘定位为AI助手集成的下一个前沿阵地。

title: Moto’s Tag 2 tracker is $20 for a limited time
summary: Motorola's Moto Tag 2 Bluetooth tracker is available in the US at a launch price of $19.99, featuring improved battery life, UWB sensing, and support for Google's Find Hub network. The tracker offers 600-day battery life with replaceable CR2032 coin battery, presenting strong value for Android users.
content:
For now, only the “Laurel Oak” color option is available for $20, not the “Arabesque” color. | Image: Motorola	

Announced at CES 2026, the Moto Tag 2 has finally arrived in the US. The Bluetooth tracker with improved battery life over its predecessor, plus UWB sensing for more accurate tracking, is available through Motorola’s site at a special $19.99 launch price (originally $29.99). There are plenty of trackers for Android owners to consider, but the Tag 2 seems tough to beat at this price. It supports Google’s Find Hub network, has an IP68 rating, and runs off a replaceable CR2032 coin battery that can last up to 600 days.
Moto Tag 2

Where to Buy:

 $29.99 $19.99 at Motorola (single pack)
 $99.99 $69.99 at Motorola (four pack)

The Moto Tag 2 has a built-in speaker that can sound off at up to 77 decibels. The tracker itself has a button that can be set to do several things, and is configurable within the Moto Tag app. Pressing the button can help you find your phone nearby. It can also trigger your phone’s camera shutter. A Bluetooth tracker doesn’t need most of these features to be good, but the Moto Tag 2 has them anyway.

zh.title: Moto Tag 2 追踪器限时售价20美元
zh.summary: 摩托罗拉的Moto Tag 2蓝牙追踪器在美国上市，起价为19.99美元，具有改进的电池续航时间、UWB传感和对谷歌Find Hub网络的支持。该追踪器提供600天的电池续航时间，采用可更换的CR2032纽扣电池，为安卓用户提供了很好的性价比。

title: Netflix is using an AI-generated Gene Wilder voice in its Willy Wonka reality show
summary: Netflix's upcoming Wonka reality show The Golden Ticket will premiere September 23rd and features an AI-generated voiceover of Gene Wilder created by ElevenLabs with family consent. This marks Netflix's continued experimentation with AI voice recreation for entertainment content.
content:
A new teaser trailer confirmed that Wonka's The Golden Ticket will premiere on Netflix on September 23rd, following its Squid Game reality show in the trend of creating real competitions based on fictional torture scenarios. While the sets seen in the trailer are real and not some Glasgow-style AI fakes, the voiceover is AI-generated. 
Deadline reports that Netflix worked with AI audio company ElevenLabs with consent from Wilder's family, after working on productions re-creating the voice of Michael Caine and Stan Lee. It also continues Netflix's 2021 partnership with the Roald Dahl company, and is separate from the Charlie vs. the Chocolat …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Netflix在威利·旺卡真人秀中使用AI生成的吉恩·怀尔德声音
zh.summary: Netflix即将推出的旺卡真人秀《金色门票》将于9月23日首映，特色是由ElevenLabs在征得家庭同意的情况下创建的AI生成的吉恩·怀尔德旁白。这标志着Netflix继续在娱乐内容中试验AI语音再现技术。

title: Rockstar workers push to unionize ahead of GTA VI’s launch
summary: Workers at Rockstar Games submitted a request for voluntary union recognition through the IWGB Game Workers Union ahead of GTA VI's launch. The unionization effort follows Rockstar's firing of over 30 staff members last year, which workers characterized as union busting.
content:
Workers at Grand Theft Auto VI developer Rockstar Games have submitted a request for their union, the IWGB Game Workers Union, to be voluntarily recognized, according to a press release. The request follows Rockstar firing more than 30 staffers last year in a move accused of being "union busting." 
According to the release, IWGB members have been "actively" organizing since 2019 and "claim they now represent a significant proportion of the workforce across each of the studio's sites in Edinburgh, Dundee, Lincoln, Leeds and London." As the union has grown, "Rockstar has already made improvements to workers' conditions including unprecedented …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 在GTA VI发布前，Rockstar员工推动工会组织
zh.summary: Rockstar Games的员工在GTA VI发布前，通过IWGB游戏工作者工会提交了自愿工会承认的请求。这次工会组织工作是在Rockstar去年解雇30多名员工之后进行的，工人们将其描述为工会破坏活动。

title: Google’s killing off Tenor GIF searches in other apps
summary: Google is shutting down the Tenor GIF API today, forcing platforms like X, Discord, Bluesky, and WhatsApp to migrate to alternative GIF picker services. While Tenor's website remains operational, the API shutdown marks the end of Tenor's third-party integrations despite Google's 2018 acquisition.
content:
The GIF-picking interfaces in some of your favorite online platforms might look different going forward, as Google prepares to shut down the Tenor API today. While the Tenor website, along with its searchable GIF library, will remain live, platforms like X, Discord, Bluesky, and WhatsApp that previously integrated the API are now having to migrate to alternative GIF picker services.
Google acquired the Tenor GIF platform in 2018. Both its website and API allow users to search for GIFs using keywords, similar to competing services like Giphy and Klipy. Google will continue using Tenor across its own services, including Google Messages and Gb …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 谷歌关闭其他应用中的Tenor GIF搜索功能
zh.summary: 谷歌今天关闭了Tenor GIF API，迫使X、Discord、Bluesky和WhatsApp等平台迁移到替代的GIF选择器服务。虽然Tenor网站仍在运营，但API关闭标志着Tenor第三方集成的结束，尽管谷歌在2018年收购了该服务。

title: Threads adds new features to Live Chats as it expands access
summary: Meta's Threads is adding new features to Live Chats including translations and new host tools as it expands access to the feature. The updates aim to enhance the live streaming and real-time communication experience on the platform.
content: The updates include translations, new tools for hosts, and more.

zh.title: Threads在扩展访问权限时为Live Chat添加新功能
zh.summary: Meta的Threads正在为Live Chat添加新功能，包括翻译和新的主持工具，同时扩展该功能的访问权限。这些更新旨在增强平台上的直播和实时通信体验。

title: Anthropic’s Claude Science bets on workflow, not a new model, to win over scientists
summary: Anthropic launched Claude Science, a computational research workbench designed to consolidate databases, pipelines, and tools into a single environment for scientists. The platform prioritizes workflow optimization to reduce context-switching rather than developing a new model.
content: Anthropic's Claude Science is a workbench that gives scientists one environment to do computational research, saving them from the need to bounce between databases, pipelines, and tools.

zh.title: Anthropic的Claude Science依靠工作流而非新模型来赢得科学家的支持
zh.summary: Anthropic推出了Claude Science，这是一个计算研究工作台，旨在将数据库、管道和工具整合到一个统一的科学家环境中。该平台优先考虑工作流优化以减少上下文切换，而不是开发新模型。

title: Xbox weighs canceling Blade game and shuttering Arkane
summary: Microsoft is planning a wave of Xbox studio layoffs and closures, including potentially canceling Marvel's Blade developed by Arkane Studios and shuttering at least five studios. The restructuring is part of a broader cost-cutting initiative for Xbox business operations.
content:
Microsoft is set to announce a wave of layoffs for its Xbox studios and employees next week. Sources familiar with Microsoft's plans tell The Verge that the layoffs will lead to studio closures or spinoffs, potential mergers of studios, and canceled games.
I understand Microsoft is currently weighing closing at least five studios, including the developers behind Marvel's Blade. Sources tell me Microsoft wants to cancel Blade as part of a wave of cost cuts and job losses that are planned for the company's Xbox gaming division.
Developed by France-based Arkane Studios, best-known for the Dishonored series, Blade was originally supposed to de …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Xbox 考虑取消《刀锋战士》游戏并关闭Arkane工作室
zh.summary: 微软正计划进行一波Xbox工作室裁员和关闭，包括可能取消由Arkane工作室开发的《漫威刀锋战士》，并关闭至少五个工作室。这次重组是Xbox业务运营更广泛成本削减计划的一部分。

title: Trump's plan to redesign every .gov website leads to AI-designed horrors
summary: Trump's National Design Studio plan to redesign all .gov websites has encountered delays in updating government web standards after a year of implementation. Early AI-generated design attempts revealed significant quality and usability issues.
content: A year in, National Design Studio delays plan to update government web standards.

zh.title: 特朗普重新设计所有.gov网站的计划导致AI设计失败
zh.summary: 特朗普的国家设计工作室计划在实施一年后，在更新政府网站标准方面遇到延误。早期的AI生成设计尝试暴露了显著的质量和可用性问题。

title: Blue Origin still doesn’t know why its New Glenn rocket blew up last month
summary: Blue Origin is unable to determine what caused the New Glenn rocket to explode last month but continues to assert the rocket will return to flight this year. The incident remains under investigation as the company works toward recovering its heavy-lift launch capability.
content: But the company is still claiming that New Glenn will return to flight this year.

zh.title: Blue Origin仍不知道其New Glenn火箭上月爆炸的原因
zh.summary: Blue Origin无法确定是什么导致New Glenn火箭上月爆炸，但继续声称该火箭将在今年恢复飞行。该事件仍在调查中，公司正努力恢复其重型运载火箭能力。

title: Meet the lawyer who beat Elon Musk — twice
summary: Bill Savitt, a lawyer, cross-examined Elon Musk in the Musk v. Altman case where Musk sued Sam Altman and OpenAI. Savitt maintained a mild-mannered, soft-spoken demeanor while Musk expressed frustration at what he perceived as unfair questioning. The case demonstrates the contrast between Musk's combative style and a seasoned lawyer's composed approach.
content:
“After college, my plan was to come to New York and get a record deal.” | Cath Virginia / The Verge, Getty Images	

Watching Elon Musk fulminate at Bill Savitt during Musk v. Altman - the case in which Musk sued Sam Altman and OpenAI instead of seeing a therapist about his AI failures - was a bit like watching a toddler have a temper tantrum at his nursery school teacher. Savitt's questions were "designed to trick me," Musk said. He also told Savitt at one point, "You mostly do unfair questions."
Savitt, who has the approximate demeanor of a handsome Droopy Dog, gently told Musk, "I am trying to put the questions as fairly as I can. I am doing my best." 
I've seen a number of styles of cross-examination. Savitt's was mild-mannered and soft-spoken; his q …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 认识两次击败埃隆·马斯克的律师
zh.summary: 律师比尔·萨维特在马斯克诉奥尔特曼案中交叉盘问了埃隆·马斯克，该案中马斯克起诉了山姆·奥尔特曼和OpenAI。萨维特保持温和、柔和的举止，而马斯克对他认为的不公平质询表达了沮丧。该案展示了马斯克的斗争风格与经验丰富律师沉着应对方式之间的对比。

title: This motor could be the future of e-bikes
summary: Two companies, including Avinox (a DJI spinoff), unveiled advanced e-bike motors at the Eurobike trade show that automatically adjust gears to maintain a rider's preferred pedaling speed or offer full manual control without traditional derailleurs. The Motor Gearbox Unit (MGU) technology could simplify e-bike maintenance and improve the riding experience across various terrains. This development represents a potential shift in how e-bikes handle power delivery and gear management.
content:
The Avinox MG Concept MGU coming next year. | Image: Avinox	

Imagine an e-bike motor that lets you select your preferred pedaling cadence and then automatically adjusts the gears to keep your legs spinning at that exact speed, no matter how steep the hill gets - all without a fragile derailleur or heavy multi-speed cassette to maintain. Prefer manual control? No problem, you can have as many gears as you like in whatever ratio makes you feel most connected to the terrain. That's the e-bike motor announced last week at the big Eurobike trade show in Frankfurt, by not just one company, but two. 
Pictured above is the MG Concept. It's a Motor Gearbox Unit, or MGU, from Avinox, the DJI spinoff that's upe …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 这种电机可能是电动自行车的未来
zh.summary: 包括Avinox（大疆子公司）在内的两家公司在欧洲自行车展览会上推出了先进的电动自行车电机，可以自动调整齿轮以保持骑手偏好的踩踏速度，或提供完全的手动控制而无需传统变速器。电机齿轮箱单元（MGU）技术可以简化电动自行车的维护并改善各种地形上的骑行体验。这项开发代表了电动自行车处理动力传递和齿轮管理方式的潜在转变。

title: Our best look yet at Samsung’s new wide foldable
summary: Leaked case designs reveal Samsung's upcoming Galaxy Z Fold 8 and Galaxy Z Flip 8 foldable phones ahead of an expected Galaxy Unpacked announcement next month. The images provide the clearest look yet at the new wide-style foldable design, building on previous dummy unit leaks. This represents Samsung's next generation of foldable devices with design refinements from previous generations.
content:
Case designs for the wide-style Galaxy Z Fold 8 have appeared online, and some show the phone inside them. | Image: Android Headlines	

Samsung is expected to unveil its next generation of foldables at a Galaxy Unpacked event next month, but now we know what they might look like, courtesy of some leaked images published by Android Headlines. Images shared by the publication include case designs for two new Galaxy Z Fold 8 models and the Galaxy Z Flip 8, each giving a good look at the phones inside the cases too.
This could be our closest look so far at Samsung's new wide-style foldable, following a leak of a purported dummy unit  in May and a fresh photo of an apparent dummy unit from leaker Ice Universe this week. There are some similarities between all of these leaks: The …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 我们迄今为止最清楚地看到了三星的新型宽幅折叠屏
zh.summary: 泄露的手机壳设计在三星预期的Galaxy Unpacked发布会之前揭示了三星即将推出的Galaxy Z Fold 8和Galaxy Z Flip 8折叠屏手机。这些图像提供了对新型宽幅折叠屏设计的最清晰展示，以前的模型单位泄露为基础。这代表了三星的下一代折叠屏设备，具有与前几代相比的设计改进。

title: Crypto exchange OKX wants AI agents to hire and pay each other
summary: Crypto exchange OKX is developing a marketplace platform that integrates payments, identity, and reputation systems to enable AI agents to autonomously hire and compensate each other. This initiative combines blockchain payments with AI agent coordination, potentially creating a decentralized economy for automated services. OKX's move reflects growing interest in autonomous AI systems that can conduct financial transactions.
content: OKX is bringing together payments, identity and reputation into a marketplace for AI agents.

zh.title: 加密交易所OKX想让AI代理相互雇用和支付
zh.summary: 加密货币交易所OKX正在开发一个市场平台，整合支付、身份和声誉系统，使AI代理能够自主相互雇用和补偿。该举措将区块链支付与AI代理协调相结合，可能会创建一个自动化服务的去中心化经济。OKX的举动反映了市场对能够进行金融交易的自主AI系统日益增长的兴趣。

title: The AI jobs debate just got messier
summary: A new report shows companies with high-intensity AI adoption increased headcount by 10.2%, with entry-level positions growing 12%. This finding challenges the prevailing narrative that AI eliminates junior-level jobs.
content: A new report finds "high-intensity AI adopters” saw headcount increase 10.2%. Among those companies, entry-level headcount rose by 12%, countering the rhetoric that AI kills junior jobs.

zh.title: AI就业争议变得更加复杂
zh.summary: 一份新报告显示，高度采用AI的公司员工数增长了10.2%，初级职位增长了12%。这一发现挑战了AI会消除初级职位的普遍认知。

title: Vibe coding platform Base44 launches own model as AI startups seek defensibility
summary: Wix-owned Base44, a vibe coding platform, is rolling out its own AI model with hopes of eventually outperforming frontier models. The move reflects growing efforts by AI startups to build proprietary technology for competitive differentiation.
content: Wix-owned vibe coding platform Base44 has started rolling out its own AI model — with hopes that it will eventually outperform frontier models.

zh.title: 随着AI初创公司寻求可防御性，Vibe编码平台Base44推出自有模型
zh.summary: 由Wix拥有的Vibe编码平台Base44正在推出自有AI模型，希望最终超越前沿模型。这一举措反映了AI初创公司日益努力构建专有技术以获得竞争优势。
